docs-match-code.prompt:
You are checking whether new public symbols in the GeoBrix codebase have documentation.

# Full diff
{input_0}

# All current docs files
{input_1}

# Task
1. From the diff, identify new public symbols. Project conventions:
   - Scala: `def`/`object`/`class` in `src/main/scala/.../{rasterx,gridx,vectorx}/`
   - Python: top-level `def`/`class` in `python/geobrix/src/databricks/labs/gbx/`
   - SQL: new `gbx_rst_*`, `gbx_bng_*`, `gbx_st_*` UDFs visible in registration files
2. For each new symbol, check whether `docs/` references it (case-sensitive substring or close match).
3. Flag symbols with no apparent doc entry.

Reply with exactly one line (tab-separated):
PASS|FAIL|REVIEW	high|low	one-line reason — if FAIL, list up to 3 undocumented symbols

binding-parity.name: Every registered function exists in all bindings
binding-parity.cmd: [ -f docs/scripts/check-binding-parity.py ] || { echo 'parity script absent; skip'; exit 0; }; python3 docs/scripts/check-binding-parity.py
